title: galium lucidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Galium lucidum subsp. rigidum, also known as Galium rigidum, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly referred to as the bedstraw or cleavers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galium lucidum subsp. rigidum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Galium lucidum subsp. rigidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
